name: IdsEdwClsPlnDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH cte_ClsPln AS (
    SELECT CLS_PLN.CLS_PLN_SK,
           CLS_PLN.CLS_PLN_ID,
           CLS_PLN.BUY_UP_IN,
           CLS_PLN.CLS_PLN_DESC,
           CLS_PLN.CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD_SK,
           CLS_PLN.PCMH_IN,
           COALESCE(CD_SRC.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD
      FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN CLS_PLN
      LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD_SRC
             ON CLS_PLN.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD_SRC.CD_MPPNG_SK
),
cte_ClsPln2 AS (
    SELECT c.CLS_PLN_SK,
           c.SRC_SYS_CD,
           c.CLS_PLN_ID,
           c.BUY_UP_IN,
           c.CLS_PLN_DESC,
           c.CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD_SK,
           c.PCMH_IN,
           COALESCE(CD_MTR_TRGT.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS MTR_CD,
           COALESCE(CD_MTR_TRGT.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS MTR_CD_NM
      FROM cte_ClsPln c
      LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD_MTR_TRGT
             ON c.CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD_SK = CD_MTR_TRGT.CD_MPPNG_SK
),
cte_Final AS (
    SELECT c.CLS_PLN_SK,
           c.SRC_SYS_CD,
           c.CLS_PLN_ID,
           @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
           @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
           c.BUY_UP_IN AS CLS_PLN_BUY_UP_IN,
           c.CLS_PLN_DESC,
           CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(c.MTR_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE c.MTR_CD END AS CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD,
           CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(c.MTR_CD_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE c.MTR_CD_NM END AS CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_NM,
           @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
           @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
           c.CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD_SK,
           c.PCMH_IN AS CLS_PLN_PCMH_IN
      FROM cte_ClsPln2 c
)
SELECT * FROM cte_Final
